title: The Alliance Says Farewell to Wano
description: On pages 8–10, this part focuses on Unknown person #7, Yamato, Hiyori, Momonosuke, Unknown person #8, Nami as Wano celebrates liberation while Momonosuke becomes shogun, Green Bull threatens the island, and the alliance prepares to depart.
scene: Wano celebrates liberation while Momonosuke becomes shogun, Green Bull threatens the island, and the alliance prepares to depart.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: You have all done exceptionally well...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The freedoms of the fire festival shall not end tonight!! Starting tomorrow, all of you will be able to live as you wish!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You may drink as much as you please!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You will no longer be charged for clean water!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The toxic factories that have ravaged our land will be abolished!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Slavery will cease to exist in Wano from this day forward!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It may be our turn to go tomorrow...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Otama-chan... this will be difficult to hear...

dialogue.speaker: Yamato
dialogue.text: But your father and mother are--

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Hats for sale! Get your hats here!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Does anybody need a hand woven hat?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You are an orphan, I take it? Please do not give in...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It will only be a few more years...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Soon the Kozuki clan's mighty warriors will make their return!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: When that day comes, we'll finally be rid of those demonic oni. They will no longer poison this land.

summary: This part advances the Wano Aftermath through 44 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
